C0500 Brief Interview for Mental Status (BIMS) Score Number CHAR 2 This column contains the BIMS (Brief Interview for Mental Status) score, which is calculated by adding the scores in items C0200-C0400.
103 C0600_CNDCT_STF_MENTL_STUS_CD C0600_CNDCT_STF_MENTL_STUS_CD C0600 Staff to Conduct Brief Interview for Mental Status CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether or not a staff assessment for mental status should be performed. -=Not assessed/no information
